name: chain_ph_launch_assembly_20_build_modern_c
method: [PH LAUNCH] Assembly 2.0: Build modern client portals for service businesses

stages.task: Scrape LinkedIn/Reddit/Upwork for agencies, consultants, freelancers with no client portal (look for Notion links, Google Drive shares, email attachments as delivery signals)
Score leads: active in last 30d, apparent revenue >$2K/mo, no existing portal tool (Notion/ClickUp is not a portal — that's a qualifier)
Send cold email: 'Built a client portal for [niche] businesses in 24h — [screenshot]. Want one?' — uses our existing cold_email scripts
On reply, deliver portal template (app factory build) customized with their branding. Charge $297-497 one-time or $97/mo hosted.
